creator: tobez@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Are you sure that you have the most recent version of PostgreSQL 
installed? 

The old versions used to have headers in /usr/local/pgsql/include and 
libraries in /usr/local/pgsql/lib, but the current version uses 
/usr/local/include/pgsql and /usr/local/lib, respectively. 

It is quite natural that the p5-DBD-Pg port adheres to the currently 
used convention.
